notes: Preset Status Bar now updates in real-time when you change settings
Centralized device state management for better reliability
Brightness slider reads device brightness on connect
Global brightness slider on Presets and Advanced screens
Advanced Mode warning shows once per session
Presets tab remembers your last sub-tab selection

Default Presets tab with curated presets

Copy default presets to My Presets for customization
Battery indicator turns red at 10% (was 20%)
OTA update dialog shows firmware release notes
Device name limited to 15 characters
Website link in Help dialog
Duplicate preset name detection
Advanced tab with inline layer settings — no more separate screen
Layer sub-tabs (1, 2, 3) for quick switching
Tab renamed from 'Customize' to 'Advanced'
Advanced Mode warning on first entry
Global brightness control via device.brightness command
Battery voltage threshold recalibrated (4020mV = 100%)
Smoother battery discharge curve (8-point table)
Device reports bootloader version via device.bootloader command
NVM write ordering fixed across all 60+ command handlers
ParameterStorage namespace extraction
Preset save-before-apply with retry logic
BLE shut down before deep sleep
NVM write functions return success/failure
